summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of FitBeats iteration 11 fixes. All 12 test cases passed: Spotify popup with 'Abrir' button, mobile search visibility, class mode audio playback, seekable progress bars, offline save button, and profile Spotify connect.

issues: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in transition duration select - hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Spotify search 'workout' returns 20 tracks with names, artists, album images, durations
Click Spotify track → popup appears with track info (album cover, name, artist)
Popup has 'Abrir' button with correct href: https://open.spotify.com/track/{spotify_id}
Popup has 'Conecta Spotify Premium' link pointing to /profile
Close popup (X button) dismisses it successfully
Mobile (390px) Spotify search - track names fully visible: 'Work Out', 'Let It All Work Out', 'The New Workout Plan'
Mobile (390px) Songs view - track names visible with proper truncation: 'TABATA- Push to start f...', 'TABATA- Umbrella X w...'
Class mode: Open 'HIIT Session 30min', Start class → PAUSE icon visible in player bar (audio plays)
Class mode: Progress bar is input[type=range] with data-testid=class-progress-bar - SEEKABLE
Class mode: 2 timeline segments visible and clickable
Playlist detail: 'Save offline' button (CloudArrowDown icon) visible with title 'Guardar para reproducción offline'
Profile page accessible from dropdown menu, shows Spotify 'Conectar' button
Regular mix playback works - PAUSE icon visible when song plays (regression test passed)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ClassModeView.js line 463-464 - <span> inside <option> causes React hydration warning. Consider removing the span wrapper.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: HIIT Session 30min class session, Cardio Vibes 2026 playlist
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 frontend fixes verified working: 1) Spotify tracks without preview_url now show popup with 'Abrir' button linking to open.spotify.com/track/{id} and 'Conecta Spotify Premium' link. 2) Mobile (390px) Spotify search shows full track names. 3) Mobile songs view shows readable track names with proper truncation. 4) Class mode audio playback works - PAUSE icon visible in player bar. 5) Class mode progress bar is seekable input[type=range]. 6) Timeline segments are clickable. 7) Playlist detail has CloudArrowDown offline save button. 8) Profile page has Spotify connect button. 9) Regular mix playback still works.

features_verified.spotify_popup_abrir_button: WORKING - popup shows with 'Abrir' button href=https://open.spotify.com/track/{id}
features_verified.mobile_spotify_search_names: WORKING - full track names visible (e.g., 'Work Out', 'Let It All Work Out')
features_verified.mobile_songs_view_names: WORKING - readable names with truncation (e.g., 'TABATA- Push to start f...')
features_verified.class_mode_audio_playback: WORKING - PAUSE icon visible in player bar when class starts
features_verified.playlist_offline_save_button: WORKING - CloudArrowDown icon with title 'Guardar para reproducción offline'
features_verified.regular_mix_playback: WORKING - PAUSE icon visible when song plays
